basic_details.job_title: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES)
basic_details.short_information: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) has officially announced the Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 22 May 2026 at the official RITES website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 60 years and hold qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc in Civil/Environmental/Chemical/Public Health Engineering and M.Tech/M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental/Public Health/Structural/Chemical/Sanitary/Water Resource Engineering can now submit their online applications from 22 May 2026 to 12 June 2026. Direct links to download the noti

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil / Environmental / Chemical / Public Health Engineering, M.Tech / M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental / Public Health / Structural / Chemical / Sanitary / Water Resource Engineering
qualification.details: Individual Consultant: Used Water Expert: B.E. / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil / Environmental / Chemical / Public Health Engineering AND M.Tech / M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental / Public Health / Structural / Chemical / Sanitary / Water Resource Engineering. Preference: Candidate holding PhD will be given preference. Individual Consultant: Standard & Specification Expert: B.E. / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil / Environmental / Chemical / Public Health Engineering AND M.Tech / M.E./M.Sc. in Environmental / Public Health / Structural / Chemical / Sanitary / Water Resource Engineering. Preference: Candidate holding PhD will be given preference.

salary_details.details: Individual Consultant: Used Water Expert: Rs. 1,60,000/- to Rs. 2,00,000/- p.m. based on experience in Sewage / Waste Water Management / Sludge Management Individual Consultant: Standard & Specification Expert: Rs. 1,80,000/- to Rs. 2,00,000/- p.m. based on experience in Standards and Specifications in sewage, wastewater management, sludge management and solid waste management

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RITES Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RITES to complete the application.
